name: @livepeer-rewrite/video-gateway-web-ui
description: Operator admin SPA for the video-gateway. Composes customer-portal/frontend/shared widgets and adds video-specific admin pages (assets / streams / webhooks / recordings).

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/web-ui/components dist/portal/src/components && cp web-ui/components/*.css dist/web-ui/components/ && cp portal/src/components/*.css dist/portal/src/components/
scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && mkdir -p dist-test/web-ui/components dist-test/portal/src/components && cp web-ui/components/*.css dist-test/web-ui/components/ && cp portal/src/components/*.css dist-test/portal/src/components/ && node --test ./dist-test/test/**/*.test.js
